missed_changes: Strong new emphasis on modular vs monolithic blockchain architecture and the 'modularity paradox' (interfaces as constraints that de-constrain)
Explicit thesis that L2s extend rather than fragment Ethereum's network effects and unlock permissionless innovation (incl. EigenLayer, restaking, LayerZero, NEAR DA)
Vocal anti-'safetyism' / pro-risk-taking stance: stagnation and atrophy framed as the greatest existential risk
Concrete focus on web3 music (Sound.xyz Series A lead) as a flagship digital-ownership bet
Named specific L1 ecosystems as his focus (Ethereum and Solana) despite the prediction claiming he operates only at the sector level
notes: Every predicted stance was directly echoed in the window. Crypto x AI (Aug podcast, Dec a16z big ideas), ZK (Lasso/Jolt, zkML, Aztec, SNARKs), DePIN/decentralized compute (Gensyn), and decentralized social/ownership (XMTP, Sound) are all explicit. The anti-speculation/'no casino' concern is the most strongly confirmed (Dec 7-8 threads). Regulation concern appears via the Dec 15 swipe at D.C. bureaucrats. The CeFi/intermediary concern is confirmed at stance level via consistent anti-trusted-intermediary messaging (relayers, middlemen, opaque institutions) rather than direct FTX/custodian commentary. Near-term liquid-market caution wasn't priced separately but the build-through-downturn posture is clearly present. The prediction missed his heavy modularity/architecture theme and his pro-risk/anti-stagnation philosophy.
